title: Café Server/Barista
description: Serve customers, prepare coffee and snacks, handle payments. Perfect for practicing French!
howToApply: Walk-in with CV to local cafés, especially in student areas. Best time: September-October and January-February

title: Food Delivery Rider
description: Deliver food for Uber Eats, Deliveroo, or Glovo. Flexible hours, work on your own schedule.
howToApply: Apply online at Uber Eats, Deliveroo, or Glovo websites. Need student residence permit.

title: Library Assistant
description: Organize books, help students find resources, manage check-in/check-out systems.
howToApply: Check your university's job board or visit the library administration office directly

title: English Tutor
description: Teach English to French students or professionals. Can be in-person or online.
howToApply: Post ads on LeBonCoin, Superprof, or university bulletin boards. Join tutoring platforms.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: Work in clothing stores, electronics shops, or supermarkets. Great for improving French!
howToApply: Visit stores in shopping centers with CV, especially before holiday seasons

title: Restaurant Server
description: Take orders, serve food, manage tables. Tips can add 20-30% to base pay.
howToApply: Apply in-person during non-rush hours (3-5 PM). Bring CV and be ready to start quickly.

title: Campus Ambassador
description: Represent brands on campus, organize events, manage social media for companies targeting students.
howToApply: Check job boards like JobTeaser, LinkedIn, or contact your university's career services

title: Babysitter/Nanny
description: Watch children after school, help with homework, prepare meals. Teaching English is a plus!
howToApply: Register on Yoopies, Babysitting24, or post on local Facebook groups

title: Data Entry Clerk
description: Enter data, update databases, organize digital files. Can often work remotely.
howToApply: Search on Indeed France, LinkedIn, or university job portals

title: Event Staff
description: Work at conferences, trade shows, concerts, or sports events. Setup, guest services, cleanup.
howToApply: Register with staffing agencies like Myjobcompany, Armony, or Staff Me Up

title: Research Assistant
description: Assist professors with research projects, literature reviews, data analysis.
howToApply: Contact professors in your department directly or check university research job boards

title: Supermarket Cashier
description: Operate cash register, bag groceries, assist customers. Many supermarkets actively hire students.
howToApply: Apply at Carrefour, Auchan, Leclerc, or Monoprix. Check their websites or visit in person

title: Social Media Manager (Freelance)
description: Manage social accounts for small businesses, create content, engage with followers.
howToApply: Offer services on Malt, Upwork, or contact local businesses directly

title: Gym/Sports Center Staff
description: Front desk, equipment maintenance, member assistance. Some gyms offer free membership!
howToApply: Visit local gyms like Basic Fit, Keep Cool, or university sports centers

title: Tour Guide Assistant
description: Assist with city tours, museum visits, help international tourists. Perfect for extroverts!
howToApply: Contact tour companies, tourist offices, or join platforms like GetYourGuide

title: Graphic Designer (Freelance)
description: Create logos, posters, social media graphics for clients. Build your portfolio while earning.
howToApply: Join Fiverr, 99designs, Malt, or network on LinkedIn and Instagram

title: Pet Sitter/Dog Walker
description: Walk dogs, feed pets, provide companionship when owners are away. Relaxing and fun!
howToApply: Register on Pawshake, Rover, or local Facebook pet groups

title: IT Support Assistant
description: Help with computer issues, software installation, network problems at university or companies.
howToApply: Check university IT departments, LinkedIn, or tech company job boards

title: Language Exchange Partner
description: Help French speakers learn your language while practicing French. Can be paid or exchange-based.
howToApply: Use apps like Tandem, HelloTalk, or post on ConversationExchange.com

title: Photography Assistant
description: Assist photographers at weddings, events, or studio sessions. Great for aspiring photographers!
howToApply: Contact local photography studios, wedding photographers, or join photography groups
